UNAUTHORIZED: You must be signed in to perform this action
FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to perform this action
CONFLICT: This action conflicts with existing data
RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests, please try again later
AUTH_EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Please verify your email address before signing in
AUTH_EMAIL_ALREADY_USED: This email address is already in use
AUTH_INVALID_EMAIL_VERIFICATION_TOKEN: The verification link is invalid or has expired
AUTH_INVALID_RESET_PASSWORD_TOKEN: The reset link is invalid or has expired
USER_ALREADY_HAS_PLACE: You already have a place linked to your account
EVENT_PLACE_FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to use this place
EVENT_BOOKING_CLOSED: Bookings are closed for this event
EVENT_BOOKING_OWN_EVENT: You can't book your own event
EVENT_BOOKING_ALREADY_EXISTS: You already have a booking for this event
EVENT_BOOKING_TOO_MANY_SEATS: The number of seats requested exceeds the allowed limit
EVENT_BOOKING_UPDATE_CLOSED: This booking can no longer be modified
EVENT_BOOKING_CANCEL_CLOSED: This booking can no longer be cancelled
PARTNERSHIP_COLLABORATOR_REQUIRED: A collaborator is required for this partnership
PARTNERSHIP_ALREADY_EXISTS: A partnership already exists with this person
PARTNERSHIP_INVITATION_ALREADY_SENT: An invitation has already been sent to this person
PARTNERSHIP_ACCEPT_FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to accept this partnership
PARTNERSHIP_UPDATE_FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to update this partnership
PARTNERSHIP_DELETE_FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to delete this partnership
EVENT_INVITATION_RESPOND_FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to respond to this invitation
EVENT_INVITATION_UPDATE_FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to update this invitation
ADMIN_SELF_DELETE_FORBIDDEN: You can't delete your own account from the admin panel
